meta.name: Kabir Nagpal
meta.tagline: Data Scientist | AI Strategist | Research-Driven Innovator | Business Consultant

paragraphs: I am a passionate Data Scientist and AI Strategist, currently pursuing an MBA at IIM Raipur. My expertise lies at the intersection of technology and business, allowing me to develop AI-driven solutions that optimize strategic decision-making and operational efficiency.

With a strong foundation in cybersecurity, predictive analytics, and business intelligence, I have successfully developed scalable AI models, contributed to high-impact research, and filed multiple AI patents.

My work focuses on leveraging AI for business transformation, bridging the gap between data-driven insights and enterprise growth. Passionate about solving complex problems, I thrive on building intelligent systems that drive innovation.

education.description: Majoring in Finance and Operations with Minors in IT and Strategy, I am committed to building a multidisciplinary edge. As a core member of the academic committee, I actively contribute to driving academic rigor and peer support. I co-authored a marketing publication involving primary qualitative research and in-depth thematic analysis. Demonstrating initiative and innovation, I developed Generative AI solutions to optimize workflows for both the academic office and fellow students, significantly improving efficiency and collaboration.

education.degree: Advanced Programme in Technology and AI Leadership
education.description: Through this intensive 7-month executive programme by IIT Delhi, I am deepening my expertise at the intersection of AI, digital transformation, and business strategy. The course is sharpening my ability to lead complex tech initiatives, drive innovation, and manage disruptive change within organizations. It is equipping me with the frameworks and leadership tools necessary to align emerging technologies with real-world business outcomes, reinforcing my vision to lead in the tech-driven future of business.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science Engineering
education.description: Graduated with a strong foundation in computer science, specializing in machine learning and artificial intelligence through self-driven learning and research. Co-authored three research papers with faculty and peers, reflecting a deep commitment to academic excellence. Mentored junior students through active involvement in student societies and demonstrated practical expertise by competing in multiple national-level hackathons and technical events.

experience.title: Data Scientist
bullets: Developed enterprise-grade AI-powered cybersecurity solutions to enhance threat detection and mitigation.
Strategically integrated machine learning models, boosting prediction accuracy and reducing latency by 40%.
Collaborated cross-functionally with product teams to implement AI-driven threat intelligence pipelines.
Published multiple research papers and secured intellectual property rights in AI-driven security methodologies.

internships.title: Product Manager Intern
bullets: Assessed product architecture submissions across multi-million-dollar portfolios, reducing senior review workload by ~50% through targeted candidate flagging.
Reviewed 30+ products to align legacy solutions with the TRAM framework and release principles, enabling digitization and FY25 compliance.
Collaborated with 60+ Product Owners to classify 500+ products, creating a maturity baseline for long-term tracking and strategic planning.
Recommended naming standards linking blueprints, taxonomy & finance, enabling consistent product IDs and enterprise-wide traceability.

internships.title: Data Science Intern
bullets: Developed an ML-based Upsell Prediction Model to identify customers requiring enhanced threat protection, forecasting demand with 70% accuracy.
Conducted deep data analysis on customer behavior patterns to refine predictive modeling, improving client targeting and sales efficiency.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to enhance Zscaler Private Access (ZPA), optimizing security policies and streamlining user authentication workflows.

internships.title: Data Science Intern
bullets: Led the development of multilingual keyword extraction models in 5+ languages (Hindi, Arabic, Sinhala), leveraging advanced NLP techniques to analyze public sentiment.
Pioneered the implementation of BERT-based Universal Encoder for sentiment analysis, streamlining language processing pipelines and improving efficiency.
Designed an AI-driven response system using encoder-decoder models, reducing customer query response times by 80% and enhancing customer engagement.
Developed a hierarchical classification framework for automated ticket categorization, increasing resolution accuracy and operational efficiency.

internships.title: Machine Learning Intern
bullets: Engineered a robust database that replicated real-world typing errors by modeling human behavior in text input, enhancing NLP-based predictive text applications.
Optimized the autocorrect system of Matcoms iOS keyboard, boosting accuracy from 60% to 85% through the integration of multilayer perceptron neural networks.

internships.title: Machine Learning Intern
bullets: Revamped FreJun's AI-powered transcription service, integrating real-time speech-to-text models to enhance automated meeting minutes and HR solutions.
Developed an innovative audio quality assessment model by leveraging AI-generated transcripts to measure accuracy and detect errors across multiple services.
Achieved 90% speaker recognition accuracy by designing deep learning models using Convolutional Neural Networks (CNN), enabling precise distinction between interview participants.
Led research on noise reduction and multi-speaker identification, significantly improving the reliability and efficiency of speech recognition systems.

publications.title: Sign Language Interpretation using Ensembled Deep Learning Models
publications.summary: Communication is an integral part of our daily lives. People with speech or hearing impairments often feel excluded. While Automatic Speech Recognition Systems have advanced, Signed Language Recognition Systems are still in their infancy. Our research proposes an ensembled deep learning architecture for classifying sign language characters, utilizing InceptionV3 and ResNet101 to achieve 97.24% accuracy on the ASL dataset.
publications.citation: Khanna, Samarth, and Kabir Nagpal. "Sign Language Interpretation using Ensembled Deep Learning Models." ITM Web of Conferences. Vol. 53. EDP Sciences, 2023.

publications.title: Analysis of Various Supervised Machine Learning Algorithms for Intrusion Detection
publications.summary: With the growing complexity of cyber threats, our study explores the effectiveness of supervised machine learning techniques in intrusion detection systems. By utilizing the UNSW-NB15 dataset, we compared various ML models and achieved an accuracy of 88.7%, an F-score of 88.3%, and a false alarm rate of 0.014.
publications.citation: Nagpal, Kabir, et al. "Analysis of Various Supervised Machine Learning Algorithms for Intrusion Detection." International Conference on Cyber Warfare, Security and Space Research. Cham: Springer International Publishing, 2021.

publications.title: Sound Classification Using Residual Convolutional Network
publications.summary: We introduce a novel deep learning model for classifying environmental sounds using the ESC-50 and Urban Sound datasets. Our CNN-based architecture, leveraging ResNet-type models, achieved 89.5% validation accuracy on environmental sounds and 96.76% accuracy on urban sound classification.
publications.citation: Jangid, Mahesh, and Kabir Nagpal. "Sound Classification Using Residual Convolutional Network." Data Engineering for Smart Systems: Proceedings of SSIC 2021. Springer Singapore, 2022.

publications.title: Convolutional Neural Network for Image Processing of Friction Stir Welded and Conventional Welded Joints Texture
publications.summary: This research explores the classification of welding techniques using convolutional neural networks. Our model effectively distinguishes between Conventional Welding and Friction Stir Welding, an advanced solid-state technique used for difficult-to-weld alloys.
publications.citation: Mishra, Akshansh, and Kabir Nagpal. "Convolutional Neural Network for Image Processing of Friction Stir Welded and Conventional Welded Joints Texture." Int. J. Hum. Comput. Interact. Data Min 2 (2019): 5-9.

achievements.title: Second Position – HackRX 2.0 by Bajaj Finserv
achievements.description: Developed a multilingual search engine to efficiently answer customer queries using Bajaj Finserv's internal blogs, improving customer support response time.

achievements.title: 25th Rank – The Great Indian Hiring Hackathon
achievements.description: Achieved a top 25 ranking out of 5700 participants in a nationwide hiring competition, showcasing strong problem-solving and technical abilities.

achievements.title: First Prize – MUJ ACM ML Challenge
achievements.description: Secured 1st place in a competitive machine learning challenge organized by ACM at Manipal University Jaipur, demonstrating expertise in AI and predictive modeling.

achievements.title: 2nd Runner Up – Startup Weekend Jaipur
achievements.description: Developed and pitched an innovative startup idea at Techstars Startup Weekend Jaipur, earning recognition for creativity and entrepreneurial thinking.

volunteer.title: Curator
volunteer.description: Curated and led the organization of TEDx talks, ensuring high-quality speaker selection and seamless event execution. Developed engaging content, managed event logistics, and collaborated with stakeholders to inspire meaningful discussions that reached a wide audience.

volunteer.title: Founder
volunteer.description: Initiated and nurtured a global community of machine learning enthusiasts, with thousands of participants engaging in structured learning challenges. Encouraged continuous education through curated ML resources, coding exercises, and interactive discussions. Built a network that fosters peer learning and knowledge exchange in AI.

volunteer.title: Machine Learning Mentor
volunteer.organization: PyJaipur, IEEE CS MUJ & MUJ ACM
volunteer.description: Mentored aspiring AI/ML students through various communities, including PyJaipur, IEEE CS MUJ, and MUJ ACM Student Chapter. Conducted multiple workshops, coding bootcamps, and hands-on sessions to teach Python, data science fundamentals, and advanced AI techniques. Provided technical guidance on real-world AI projects and helped students build deployable machine learning models.

volunteer.title: Mentor
volunteer.description: Acted as a mentor for participants in Neural Hacks, guiding teams in designing and implementing AI/ML solutions during hackathons. Provided mentorship in problem-solving strategies, algorithm optimization, and effective presentation of technical solutions. Helped teams refine their ideas into actionable AI-driven prototypes.

volunteer.title: Volunteer
volunteer.description: Contributed to Kotlin/Everywhere Jaipur by assisting in organizing developer meetups, workshops, and technical talks focused on Kotlin development. Engaged with the local developer community to promote Kotlin as a modern language for Android and cross-platform applications.
